steps.title: Complete the infinitive
steps.content: The phrase is to drive their cars across France. The base verb must connect directly to its object without punctuation.

steps.title: Avoid breaking the phrase
steps.content: Choice A ends the sentence too early, Choice C inserts an unneeded colon, and Choice D incorrectly uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not an independent clause. No punctuation is needed after the verb. The answer is B.
